title: [kimi-review] 37223cc: [SEVERITY: low] The one visible hunk (ec2-arm64.yml) is trun
description:
Commit: 37223ccd5
Message: fix: batch zephyr integration, test vectors, renode support and spec updates

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] The one visible hunk (ec2-arm64.yml) is truncated mid-command (`pip3 install we...`), so even it can't be verified — if this changed the dependency install line, a typo here would silently break CI (or worse, install an unintended package).
